name: ProfitWell (Paddle)
description: ProfitWell (Paddle) — Subscription analytics and retention product integrated into Paddle providing MRR, churn, and LTV dashboards.

seo.title: ProfitWell (Paddle) — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: ProfitWell (Paddle): ProfitWell (Paddle) — Subscription analytics and retention product integrated into Paddle providing MRR, churn, and LTV dashboards.

when_to_use: Tracking MRR, churn, and LTV within Paddle subscription billing
Reducing involuntary churn via Retain product integration
Benchmarking subscription metrics against industry cohorts

pros: Free MRR, churn, and LTV metrics for Stripe accounts
Retain product reduces involuntary churn effectively
Benchmarks against anonymized SaaS peer data
Easy Stripe connection; minimal setup required
cons: Now pushed under Paddle; roadmap priorities unclear
Less flexible than ChartMogul for custom segments
Paid add-ons can become expensive quickly
Data lag and reconciliation edge cases persist
review.verdict: Free subscription analytics plus paid retention tooling; still useful, but Paddle ownership clouds the long term.
review.best_for: Stripe-based SaaS wanting free MRR dashboards and paid involuntary-churn recovery.
review.not_for: Teams needing advanced custom segmentation or certainty about product investment.
